steps.title: Find original y-intercept
steps.content:
Set $$x=0$$ in $$27x+33y=297$$ to get $$33y=297$$.
Solve: $$y=\frac{297}{33}=9$$.
So the original y‑intercept is $$(0,9)$$

steps.title: Apply downward shift
steps.content:
Shifting the graph down 5 units subtracts 5 from every y‑coordinate.
New y‑intercept: $$9-5=4$$.
Thus the shifted graph’s y‑intercept is $$(0,4)$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
